roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S OR PAROLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGEVIOLATION #2, FAILURE TO REPORT, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #2 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:140 DAYS //X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  38  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #1, ABSCONDING FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:10-14-14/X:THE COURT WOULD LIKE THE PAROLEE EVALUATED FOR POSSIBLE CONSERVATORSHIP,/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT AND TOSET/
